field_values.action_summary: The group travels northeast across a trackless mossy waste on thoats. They face starvation, dehydration, and exhaustion. During this trek, Woola joins the party, providing much-needed companionship and tracking ability.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide establishing shots of the vast, desolate landscape; Medium tracking shots of the thoats moving through the moss; Close-ups on weary faces and parched lips
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Physical condition and exhaustion level of the thoats
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH017_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the grueling nature of the journey and the mounting desperation of the fugitives through scale and physical decay.

## Required Cast
- The Narrator
- dejah_thoris
- sola
- woola

## Required Environments
- mossy_waste

## Continuity Constraints
- Physical condition/exhaustion level of the thoats
- Progression of group supplies (starvation/dehydration)

## Beat List
- BT001: Northeast trek across trackless waste.
- BT002: Manifestation of starvation, dehydration, and exhaustion.
- BT003: Woola joins the party for companionship and tracking.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity

evidence_summary: To establish the grueling nature of the journey and the mounting desperation of the fugitives.

The group travels northeast across a trackless mossy waste on thoats. They face starvation, dehydration, and exhaustion. During this trek, Woola joins the party, providing much-needed companionship and tracking ability.

Establish the physical toll of a long-distance trek across an unforgiving landscape. The visual narrative must emphasize the scale of the mossy waste against the diminishing vitality of the travelers and their mounts to communicate mounting desperation.

# Scene Contract: CH017_SC002 ## Production Intent Establish the grueling nature of the journey and the mounting desperation of the fugitives through scale and physical decay. ## Required Cast - The Narrator - dejah_thoris - sola - woola ## Required Environ...
The trek begins northeast across the mossy waste
The physical toll of starvation and dehydration sets in
Woola joins the group to provide companionship and tracking
